passiveAbilities.name: Slow
passiveAbilities.description: This model's Jog actions are limited to 2”.

passiveAbilities.name: Cutlass
passiveAbilities.description: If this character deals Slicing Melee Dmg, increase the Dmg dealt by +1.

passiveAbilities.name: Treasure Map
passiveAbilities.description: Immediately after models have been deployed but before turn 1 begins, you may have a friendly Pirate take a free bonus Jog action.

activeAbilities.name: X Marks The Spot
activeAbilities.description: Target Moonstone or enemy in possession of a Moonstone. All friendly Pirates within 4" of the target move 1" directly towards it.

activeAbilities.name: Reload [Shoot Pistol]
activeAbilities.description: The named ability can be used again. This ability cannot be used while this model is engaged.

arcaneAbilities.name: Shoot Pistol
arcaneAbilities.description:
Target suffers X+1 Impact Dmg.
Catastrophe: This character suffers 3 Wds.

signatureMove.name: Run 'em Through
signatureMove.endStepEffect: Move 2" directly towards the enemy model.
